title: Silverline Combination Squeegee Spreader 125 x 95mm - 6mm Teeth (380251)
features: Easy-to-use, flexible plastic body with built-in ruler
Smaller blade for access to restricted areas
Allows rapid & even spreading of adhesive & grout
For tiling, flooring, cladding & carpet-laying applications
description: From the manufacturer Silverline 380251 Combination Spreader Easy-to-use, flexible plastic body with built-in ruler and 3mm thick rubber squeegee blade. Smaller blade for access to restricted areas. Allows rapid and even spreading of adhesives and grout for tiling, cladding and carpet-laying applications. About us We've been around since 1978 and are now one of the biggest and best-loved tools greats around. Silverline represents great value and offers a wide range of tools. We're always events or sponsoring new exciting events and projects.
